steps.title: Use both archive dates
steps.content: A generalization about the archive should combine details instead of repeating one item. The notes include a clay cup from 1891 and a stickball collar from 2016, showing the archive includes artifacts from different periods.

steps.title: Rule out single facts
steps.content: A, B, and C each report one isolated detail about either the cup or the collar. The broad claim that not all artifacts are from the 1800s is supported by the 2016 collar. The answer is D.
